# INTENT

## User Request

Enforce subscription-based limits for number of projects and languages.

## Requested Outcome

Users should be prevented from creating more projects or language variants than their plan allows.

## Constraints

- Implement project count and language count limits only.
- Preserve existing entitlement access gating.
- Keep admin unrestricted.
- Stay aligned with pricing page limits.

## Open Questions

- None for this pass.
